Driver implementations and header for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display, managing SPI, DMA, and display states.


## Files
- **[sharp_ls013b7dh01.c](sharp_ls013b7dh01.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display, managing SPI communication, DMA transfers, and display updates.
- **[sharp_ls013b7dh01.h](sharp_ls013b7dh01.h.md)**: Header file for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display driver, defining display states and context structure.
- **[sharp_ls013b7dh01_nrf5.c](sharp_ls013b7dh01_nrf5.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display using the NRF5 microcontroller, including SPI communication and DMA updates.
